Home Categories About Contact

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

1. Introduction

Welcome to InterestDecor ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and share information about you when you visit interestdecor.com.

Please read this policy carefully. If you disagree with its terms, please stop using our site.

2. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, including:

  • Email address — when you subscribe to our newsletter or contact us via our contact form
  • Name and message — when you submit our contact form
  • Usage data — pages visited, time spent, browser type, and device information collected automatically via Google Analytics

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Send you our newsletter and blog updates (only if you subscribed)
  • Respond to your enquiries and contact form submissions
  • Analyse site traffic and improve our content using Google Analytics
  • Comply with legal obligations

We never sell your personal data to third parties.

4. Cookies

InterestDecor uses cookies to improve your experience. These include:

  • Analytics cookies — via Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our site
  • Pinterest cookies — from embedded Pinterest content and the Save button

You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect some functionality of the site.

5. Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services that may collect data independently:

  • Google Analytics — website traffic analysis (Google Privacy Policy)
  • Formspree — contact and newsletter form processing (Formspree Privacy Policy)
  • Pinterest — social sharing buttons (Pinterest Privacy Policy)
  • Vercel — website hosting (Vercel Privacy Policy)

6. Affiliate Links

Some posts on InterestDecor contain affiliate links. When you click these links and make a purchase, we may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. This helps us keep the site running. We only recommend products we genuinely believe in.

7. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Request access to the personal data we hold about you
  • Request correction or deletion of your personal data
  • Unsubscribe from our newsletter at any time using the unsubscribe link in any email
  • Contact us directly with any privacy concerns

8. Data Retention

We retain your email address for as long as you remain subscribed to our newsletter. Contact form submissions are retained for up to 12 months. You may request deletion at any time.

9. Children's Privacy

InterestDecor is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by updating the date at the top of this page. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

11. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Email: rajamashoodelahi@gmail.com

Website: interestdecor.com/contact/

InterestDecor

Your home should feel like you — beautiful, intentional, and full of life. That's what we're here to help create.
